query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `99_changelog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `titulo` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `descricao` text NOT NULL,
  `tipo` enum('feature','fix','improvement','breaking') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'feature',
  `versao` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0.0',
  `autor` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Dev_thales',
  `lido_por` text DEFAULT '[]',
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL
);
